_readme: Enrichment data keyed by modifier value (city or role name, lowercase). The engine merges this with per-row notes data. Notes column takes priority over this file.

bangalore.market_notes: Bangalore has the largest tech talent pool in India. Competition for senior engineers is intense, with average 45 days to fill specialised roles.

mumbai.market_notes: Mumbai tech hiring is concentrated in fintech, e-commerce, and enterprise services. Candidates typically expect hybrid or remote flexibility.

delhi.market_notes: Delhi-NCR has a strong pool of mid-level engineers from tier-1 colleges. Noida and Gurgaon are the primary hiring hubs within the region.

hyderabad.market_notes: Hyderabad has grown significantly as a tech hub due to HITEC City. Strong pipeline from local engineering colleges and returning diaspora.

pune.market_notes: Pune has a large mid-level engineering workforce. Cost of hiring is typically 15-20% lower than Bangalore for equivalent roles.

chennai.market_notes: Chennai is strong in product engineering and infrastructure roles. Freshworks and Zoho have anchored the local product startup ecosystem.

noida.market_notes: Noida is a cost-effective alternative to central Delhi. Strong supply of backend and QA engineers from nearby engineering institutes.

gurgaon.market_notes: Gurgaon attracts senior and leadership-level tech talent, often from MNCs and consulting firms. Higher salary expectations than other NCR locations.

nodejs.top_skills: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, REST APIs, AWS

java.top_skills: Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, Kafka, AWS
